examples: Universities, now emptying their campuses, have never tried online learning on this scale.
The grateful couple paid him back for his honesty by emptying out their pockets of all the money they had.
George squatted on the toilet and peeped forth from his lair to watch her emptying the dust bag of her vacuum cleaner into the trash can.
Finally, meanwhile the wealthy and corporations have been busy emptying the barrel for themselves.
Over at the clothing donation table, two young women were emptying large bags of groceries.
